user_prompt: Draft a follow-up message for a ticket that was marked resolved 5 days ago, just confirming everything is still working.
actual_output:
Hi [Customer Name],

I just wanted to check in since we marked your ticket as resolved a few days ago.

Is everything still working as expected on your end? If you’re still seeing any issues or have questions, just reply here and we’ll be happy to take another look.

Thanks,  
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot directly fulfilled the user's request by providing a professional and empathetic follow-up draft that aligns with its persona and guidelines.
